result: The cleaned dataset has been successfully created and saved to data/output/cleaned_data.csv. The final dataset contains 16,111 rows and 2 columns (NSID and lang). The language variable (lang) has been consolidated from the 4 waves with proper missing value code harmonization. Values: -8=1, -3=174, -2=19, -1=1, 1=Yes-English only=12453, 2=Yes-English first/main=1873, 3=Another language is first/main=1122, 4=Bilingual=468, no NA values.
